blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: WAIT. She already saw the list?? Bruh she checked it for you fr fr.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: She said she was walking past.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: THE LIST IS NOT NEAR THE SENIOR HALL. I walked past it this morning. She went out of her way. She likes you dawg.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: What happened at the water fountain?

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: A two-second hey from a senior who already knows your name is not nothing bruh. That's a thing.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: You walked past her didn't you.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: I didn't have anything to say.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: 'I made the team' is something to say Larry. 'Hey' is something to say. Boy chill.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Bruh 😭 we are going to do drills. Social drills. Every day.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Homie I just watched you freeze in front of a girl who likes you. You need the drills.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: Can we talk about literally anything else.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: First practice is today. After school. That we can talk about.
